fields.summary: Refactor DistributedScheduling framework to pull out common functionality
Scheduling of OPPORTUNISTIC containers through YARN RM

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: Opening this JIRA to track the some refactoring missed in YARN-5113:

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

comments.body:
I propose the following changes :

* Move {{OpportunisticContainerAllocator}} to yarn-server-common
** Fix the constructor to just pass in the appropriate TokenSecretManager instead of the NodeStatusUpdater.
* Move the {{DistributedScheduler}} class to yarn-server-common and probably move all the app specific bookkeeping to the SchedulerNode.
* Rename {{DistributedSchedulingAMService}} to {{OpportunisticSchedulingAMService}}
** modify the {{getServer}} method to enable the new protocol only if DistributedScheduling is enabled.
** modify the allocate method to intercept all OPPORTUNISTIC requests and use the {{OpportunisticContainerAllocator}} to allocate and create the containers.
Assigning this to myself, since I have a patch ready..
Attaching initial patch. [~kkaranasos], let me know what you think

comments.body:
I propose the following changes :

* Move {{OpportunisticContainerAllocator}} to yarn-server-common
** Fix the constructor to just pass in the appropriate TokenSecretManager instead of the NodeStatusUpdater.
* Move the {{DistributedScheduler}} class to yarn-server-common and probably move all the app specific bookkeeping to the SchedulerNode.
* Rename {{DistributedSchedulingAMService}} to {{OpportunisticSchedulingAMService}}
** modify the {{getServer}} method to enable the new protocol only if DistributedScheduling is enabled.
** modify the allocate method to intercept all OPPORTUNISTIC requests and use the {{OpportunisticContainerAllocator}} to allocate and create the containers.
Assigning this to myself, since I have a patch ready..
Attaching initial patch. [~kkaranasos], let me know what you think
